cards.title: Expo scaffolding & design system
cards.notes: Phase 1 complete. Expo 54 + TypeScript, Expo Router file-based nav, design tokens in constants/theme.ts (colors, typography, shadows, radii, spacing on 4px grid). Zustand stores with AsyncStorage persistence. Seed data for dev testing.

cards.title: Onboarding flow — 13 screens
cards.notes: Welcome, email auth, forgot/reset password, add child (birthday picker, color auto-assign), mic permission, location permission, notifications time picker, first recording, first memory text, memory saved celebration, welcome preview, paywall. All with empty/loading/error states.

cards.title: Home screen & timeline feed
cards.notes: ~2200 LOC. Feed timeline with child tabs, collapsible search bar with full-text search, tag/date filter chips, highlighted results, result count pill, draft banner, empty state, first-entry celebration. Uses useSearchFilter hook for FTS + filtering.

cards.title: Recording pipeline
cards.notes: Voice capture via expo-speech-recognition (on-device, persist:true). Real-time partial transcript, waveform viz, 60s timer with 'Keep Going' button (extends to 3 min). Audio concat, WAV upload to Supabase Storage. Speech-to-text + text fallback. Rotating prompts from DB.

cards.title: Entry detail view
cards.notes: ~1900 LOC. View/edit text + metadata (date, location, age). Child/tag pills with add/remove. Audio playback (play/pause/scrub). Favorite heart toggle with animation. Delete with confirmation. Re-record flow. Photo grid frame exists but awaiting data model (V1.5).

cards.title: Firefly Jar (favorites archive)
cards.notes: Warm gradient background, serif title, memory count, larger cards, inline audio play, floating firefly animations, child tabs, empty state. Glow header component. Hidden when trial lapses.

cards.title: Settings screen
cards.notes: ~1400 LOC. Children list with add/edit/delete. Notification time picker (5-min increments) + day-of-week selector. Subscription status display (trial countdown / active / expired). Recently Deleted section. Data export stub (button present, backend TBD). Account deletion flow (calls delete-account edge function). About/legal links. FAQ and Contact sub-screens. Settings has 147 lines of additional uncommitted changes (Mar 31).

cards.title: Supabase backend — 13 tables, 41 migrations
cards.notes: Profiles, families, family_members, children, family_children, entries, entry_children, tags, entry_tags, prompts, user_devices, prompt_history, notification_log. RLS on every table. Full-text GIN indexes. Storage bucket for audio (private, upsert). 10 service modules in services/. Generated TypeScript types.

cards.title: Auth system — email + Apple + Google
cards.notes: Supabase Auth with email/password, Apple Sign-In (OAuth), Google Sign-In (OAuth). Magic link for password reset. Protected routes — unauthed → onboarding, authed → main app. OAuth redirects configured for forever-fireflies:// deep link scheme. Session persistence via AsyncStorage.

cards.title: Edge functions — AI processing, notifications, cleanup
cards.notes: 4 edge functions: (1) process-entry v10 — Claude Haiku generates titles, cleans transcripts, smart tags. (2) send-notifications — pg_cron, Expo Push API, personalized prompts, backoff logic. (3) delete-account — hard-deletes all user data. (4) purge-deleted — daily cron, 30-day retention. All deployed and working. process-entry has uncommitted refinements in progress (Mar 31).

cards.title: Push notifications — full pipeline
cards.notes: End-to-end: user picks time in Settings → app converts to UTC → pg_cron fires every minute → edge function finds eligible users → personalizes with child name + age → sends via Expo Push API → FCM/APNs delivery. Backoff on 5+ ignored notifications. Day-of-week filter. Firebase project configured, FCM V1 key uploaded to Expo.

cards.title: Subscription & paywall — RevenueCat
cards.notes: RevenueCat SDK integrated with dev/preview bypass. 7-day free trial via trial_started_at. Idempotent start_trial RPC. Guard trigger blocks client tampering. 3-gate subscription check (dev bypass → RevenueCat → trial). Post-trial lockout: browse-only, no recording/editing/playback. PostTrialPaywall modal. Paywall in onboarding flow.

cards.title: Analytics & error tracking
cards.notes: Sentry error tracking with user context + navigation breadcrumbs. PostHog event tracking — 8 key events across onboarding, recording, browsing, subscription. Funnels configured: Onboarding → Subscription, Trial Engagement (avg memories in first 7 days).

cards.title: Test suite — 246 tests, all passing
cards.notes: 28 test files across utils (68 tests, 100%), stores (35 tests), components (38 tests), services (42 tests), hooks (16 tests). jest-expo preset with path aliases. Global mocks for AsyncStorage, Expo, Supabase. Test factories in __mocks__/factories.ts. Run: npm test

cards.title: Brand voice & project docs
cards.notes: CLAUDE.md (project instructions + coding patterns + lessons learned). BRAND_VOICE.md (tone rules, banned words, channel-specific guidance). design-style.md (full visual spec). Feature roadmap, product spec, database schema, app workflow, business plan, marketing plan, build guide, competitor research. All current.

cards.title: 42 reusable components
cards.notes: EntryCard, ChildPill, TagPill, MicButton, BirthdayPicker, TimePicker, ColorPicker, CityAutocomplete, SearchBar, FilterChips, ConfirmationDialog, ChildSelectModal, DraftBanner, ErrorState, FloatingFireflies, FavoriteAnimation, WarmGlow, JarGlowHeader, MilestoneCelebration, PostTrialPaywall, and more. All use theme tokens, 44px touch targets.

cards.title: Rebrand from Core Memories → Forever Fireflies
cards.notes: Deep link scheme, bundle IDs (iOS + Android), OAuth redirects, Supabase config, route renames (core-memories.tsx → firefly-jar.tsx), navigation updates, package.json, GitHub repo, Supabase project name. All done.

cards.title: Supabase dev/prod split
cards.notes: Create separate Supabase prod project so beta testers' real memories never mix with test data. Steps: new project (free tier), apply all 41 migrations, seed system tags + prompts (not test entries), deploy 4 edge functions, set secrets (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), insert Vault secrets for pg_cron, wire EAS build profiles to correct env files (.env.local → dev, .env.production → prod), smoke-test full flow on prod.

cards.title: RevenueCat account setup
cards.notes: Create RevenueCat account, create project, set up products (monthly $5.99 + annual $49.99), map to Offerings. Can start this before App Store/Play Store accounts are ready — the RevenueCat project itself doesn't need them yet. Connecting to stores is a separate blocked task.

cards.title: App icon finalization
cards.notes: Need 1024x1024 icon for App Store + all device sizes. Should reflect the Forever Fireflies brand — warm, organic, firefly motif. Expo handles adaptive icons (Android) and standard icons (iOS) from a single source. Update app.json icon/adaptiveIcon fields after design.

cards.title: Splash screen design
cards.notes: Branded splash screen shown during app load. Should match warm dark theme — logo or wordmark on dark background with subtle firefly glow. Expo splash config in app.json. Keep it simple and fast-loading.

cards.title: Prompts system expansion
cards.notes: Prompt categories and age-based prompts. Migration exists (20260329000001_add_prompt_categories_and_age_prompts.sql), uncommitted. 227 lines changed in prompts.tsx (category filtering UI), 25 lines in prompts.service.ts (category query support). Substantial progress — UI and service layer both actively being built.

cards.title: Entry detail refinements
cards.notes: 124 lines of uncommitted changes in entry-detail.tsx. entries.service.ts and entriesStore.ts also modified. Active UI refinements in progress.

cards.title: Apple Developer Program enrollment
cards.notes: BLOCKED: Requires $99/yr payment + 24-48 hour approval. Blocks: TestFlight distribution, App Store submission, RevenueCat ↔ App Store Connect, Apple Small Business Program. This is the single biggest gate for iOS launch.

cards.title: Google Play Console account
cards.notes: BLOCKED: Requires $25 one-time payment. Blocks: Google Play Internal Testing track, production listing, RevenueCat ↔ Play Store connection. Needed for Android beta distribution (currently sideloading APKs).

cards.title: TestFlight beta distribution
cards.notes: BLOCKED BY: Apple Developer Program enrollment. Build iOS preview profile via EAS, upload to TestFlight. Needed for iOS beta testers. Can prep the eas.json config now but can't actually upload until Apple Dev account is active.

cards.title: Google Play Internal Testing
cards.notes: BLOCKED BY: Google Play Console account. Switch preview profile from APK to AAB, create app listing (basics only), add testers by email. Better than sideloading — auto-updates via Play Store link.

cards.title: Connect RevenueCat to App Store / Play Store
cards.notes: BLOCKED BY: Both Apple Dev + Google Play accounts. Create in-app purchase products in App Store Connect and Play Console, then map to RevenueCat Offerings. Test with sandbox/test accounts. Remove dev bypass in lib/revenueCat.ts for prod builds.

cards.title: Physical iPhone for testing
cards.notes: BLOCKED: Needs hardware purchase. Simulator can't do voice recording, social auth, push notifications, or speech recognition. Required for iOS-specific testing before App Store submission. Currently testing Android only.

cards.title: Privacy policy
cards.notes: Required by both App Store and Play Store before submission. Must cover: data collection (voice recordings, transcripts, child info), Supabase storage, Anthropic API usage (transcripts sent for AI processing — may contain children's names spoken by parents), push notification data, analytics (PostHog, Sentry). Host on foreverfireflies.app domain.

cards.title: Terms of service
cards.notes: Required for store submission. Standard SaaS terms covering: subscription billing, data ownership (parents own their content), account deletion, acceptable use. Host alongside privacy policy on foreverfireflies.app.

cards.title: COPPA compliance review
cards.notes: App records children's information (names, birthdays, voice mentions). Listed under Lifestyle category (not Kids) which helps, but still needs careful review. See product-spec.md §8 for initial analysis. May need legal consultation. Key question: does storing child names + birthday constitute 'collecting personal information from children under 13' even though the parent is the user?

cards.title: App Store screenshots
cards.notes: Need screenshots for 6.7" and 6.1" iPhone sizes minimum. Show: home timeline, recording screen, entry detail, Firefly Jar, onboarding. Should use real-looking data (not seed data). Consider using Figma frames or device mockup tool. Apple requires at least one set; recommend 3-5 hero screenshots per device size.

cards.title: Google Play Store screenshots
cards.notes: Similar to App Store but different size requirements. Google Play allows more screenshots. Can reuse the same visual concepts but need to export at correct dimensions. Also need a feature graphic (1024x500).

cards.title: App Store listing copy
cards.notes: Description, keywords, subtitle (30 chars), promotional text. Category: Lifestyle (NOT Kids — see COPPA notes). Must follow BRAND_VOICE.md rules — quiet, warm, no buzzwords. Subtitle idea: 'Save what they say before they grow'. Keywords: parenting journal, baby journal, voice recording, family memories.

cards.title: Google Play Store listing copy
cards.notes: Similar to App Store but Google Play has different field lengths and a short description (80 chars) + full description (4000 chars). Can adapt App Store copy. Also needs a privacy policy URL.

cards.title: Apple Small Business Program
cards.notes: Apply before first sale to get 15% commission rate instead of 30%. Requires Apple Developer account to be active first. Simple application — just verify annual revenue is under $1M.

cards.title: Accessibility audit
cards.notes: Check: all interactive elements have accessibility labels, touch targets ≥44pt (mostly done), contrast ratio ≥4.5:1, Dynamic Type support. Components already use minTouchTarget from theme. Main risk areas: custom components like MicButton, BirthdayPicker, waveform visualizer.

cards.title: Performance optimization pass
cards.notes: Targets: cold start <2s, transcription start <5s, first entry save <90s from install. Profile with React DevTools + Flipper. Check for unnecessary re-renders on Home (2200 LOC). Lazy load heavy screens. Optimize FlatList rendering for large entry lists.

cards.title: Data export edge function
cards.notes: Settings has an 'Export data' button that's currently a stub. Need an edge function or RPC to package all user entries + audio files as a downloadable archive. Privacy compliance requirement — users must be able to export their data. Could be a ZIP with JSON entries + audio files, or a simpler text/CSV format.

cards.title: Email marketing setup
cards.notes: Pick email tool (Resend, Loops, or Mailchimp). Integrate with auth flow to trigger welcome sequence on account creation. Welcome series should include: (1) Welcome + quick tips, (2) 'No memories yet' nudge for users who skipped first recording, (3) Week 1 recap. See marketing-plan.md for full email strategy.

cards.title: Beta tester recruitment
cards.notes: Recruit 15-25 real parents as beta testers. Mix of iOS + Android. Need parents with children of varying ages (baby through preschool+). Sources: personal network, parenting groups, social media. Give them TestFlight / Play Store Internal Testing access. Collect structured feedback.

cards.title: Documentation cleanup — rebrand references
cards.notes: Some docs still reference 'Core Memories'. Update titles in: docs/business/scaling.md, docs/product/functional-requirements.md. Update example project names in scaling.md, product-spec.md. Update implementation-plan-phases-4-5.md references. Update architecture-explorer.html label.

cards.title: Photos on entries (V1.5)
cards.notes: Attach up to 3 photos per entry. Gallery picker only (no camera in V1.5). New entry_media table (pre-wired for video). 3 new packages: expo-image-picker, expo-image-manipulator, expo-image. Client-side compression (~800px, 80% JPEG). UI: PhotoPicker, PhotoThumbnailRow, PhotoViewer components. Entry detail already has a photo grid frame stub. See product-spec.md §V1.5.

cards.title: "On this day" memory resurfacing (V1.5)
cards.notes: Surface a memory from 1 year ago at the top of the Home feed with special card treatment. Query is straightforward (match month+day from past years). Needs a distinct card style — maybe a warm highlight or 'time capsule' visual. Low effort, high delight for returning users.

cards.title: Shareable memory cards (V1.5)
cards.notes: Tap 'Share' on any entry → generates a branded quote-card image (child's words, name + age, date, subtle Forever Fireflies watermark). Static image for iMessage, Instagram Stories, Facebook, etc. Uses native share sheet. Important for organic growth — parents sharing cute quotes is the #1 viral loop.

cards.title: Memory of the Day banner (V1.5)
cards.notes: Daily featured memory banner at top of Home screen. Pulls a past entry (random or 'on this day' if available). Includes one-tap Share button for branded quote card. Low-friction daily touchpoint for re-engagement + sharing.

cards.title: Birthday quiz feature (V1.5)
cards.notes: On a child's birthday, app sends special notification with guided questions: favorite food, funny words, current obsessions, best friends. Saves as a structured text entry — annual snapshot. Great for parents to compare year over year. Needs: birthday detection logic, special notification template, guided input UI.

cards.title: In-app contact form (V1.5)
cards.notes: Replace current mailto link (contact.tsx) with a native form. Subject dropdown (bug / feature request / question / other) + text area. Submissions saved to a feedback Supabase table with user ID, device info, app version auto-attached. More polished than mailto, captures structured data.

cards.title: Family / partner sharing (V2)
cards.notes: Each parent has their own account; they pair via invitation. Both see a unified feed. Each entry shows who recorded it. Second parent can add their perspective. RLS is already ready (family_members table exists), multi-user table exists. UI TBD. This is the biggest V2 feature.

cards.title: Interview mode — child's voice (V3)
cards.notes: Guided Q&A to record the child's own voice and answers. Speech API is available (expo-speech-recognition). UX needs careful design — prompts need to be age-appropriate and fun for kids. Consider: visual prompts, sticker rewards, keep-it-short timer. V3 feature — validate demand first.

cards.title: Fix children.service.ts type mismatch
cards.notes: createChild() RPC passes string | null values to strictly-typed RPC parameters. Works at runtime but fails TypeScript --noEmit. Fix: add null coalescing or cast to match generated types. Tracked in BUGS.md. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up.

cards.title: Xcode installation on Mac
cards.notes: Required for iOS builds even with Expo/EAS. Large download (~12GB). Need Mac hardware first. Install Xcode + accept license + install CLI tools. Needed before TestFlight uploads.

cards.title: Landing page deployment
cards.notes: landing/ directory exists with a web landing page but it's not deployed. Domain foreverfireflies.app is on Cloudflare (auto-renew, expires 2027-03-26). Deploy to Cloudflare Pages or similar. Needed for: privacy policy hosting, App Store marketing URL, pre-launch signups.

cards.title: Ink reveal transcript animation (V1.5)
cards.notes: When a voice recording is transcribed, the transcript 'writes itself' on first view — words fade in left-to-right with blur-to-sharp effect, like ink on parchment. Only triggers once per entry (voice transcripts only). Tracked via a seen flag. High delight, medium effort.

cards.title: Terms Page
cards.notes:
Add a terms page at the URL Terms and link on the login screen and link in settings

http://foreverfireflies.app/terms
